title: Visualsmaxxing
description: The bare-bones visual upgrade modpack that makes Minecraft feel brand new
body:
## Changing Minecraft... without changing Minecraft
Ever wanted a bare-bones modpack that that overhauls the appearance and feel of Minecraft without losing its vanilla charm? 

- No retextures
- No new biomes
- No mob overhauls
- No structure changes
- No shaders
- Etc...

...and still, an entirely new coat of paint that makes it feel brand new! Notable features include:

- Tinted skies and fog based on the biome
- Lively inventory mouse-based interactions
- Overhauled weather appearance (including sand/snowstorms)
- Dozens of visual particle-based additions
- Optimization for the increased particle volume
- ...and much more! 

*This is the modpack that Dimaxxing uses in all his videos, created due to (holy moly extreme) popular demand by him himself. Thus, many mod configs are modified. If anything is broken or missing, it's because he has no idea what he's doing. Please refer all complaints to the [Discord](https://discord.gg/RNxB6gXNEA) server. 

## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/G5r62LXCWPU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Disclaimer
Due to version constraints, it is not possible to put every mod mentioned in the video into a single modpack. There are multiple versions in the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/visualsmaxxing/versions) tab that you can pick from to suit your desires.

Unfortunately, I cannot directly add Locomotion to the modpack myself due to lack of permission. To use Locomotion, download the 1.21.11 version of Visualsmaxxing and go [here](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion/releases/tag/v0.1.11-playtesting) to download and add Locomotion to the modpack yourself.
